subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who remembereth whom He willeth as a token of grace from His presence. He, verily, is the All-Remembering, the All-Knowing. We have, indeed, made mention of thee aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یذکر من یشاء فضلا من عنده انه لهو الذاکر العلیم انا ذکرناک من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
